tools.name: search_frictions
tools.description: Ranked search over the Copilot Studio Friction Index. Exact error-code/message hits rank first, then title, alias, summary and symptom-checklist matches (solution bodies are NOT searched — an empty result means no record is indexed under these terms, not that the register lacks a fix). Use this when

tools.name: lookup_error
tools.description: Exact/substring match against all known Copilot Studio error codes and error messages in the register. The fastest path when you have a verbatim error string (e.g. "FlowActionTimedOut"). Returns the matching record(s) with the citable URL.

tools.name: get_friction_record
tools.description: The complete friction record for a slug: status, dates, confidence, severity, time cost, categories, channels, license context, error codes/messages, dated evidence list, and the six body sections as markdown (symptom checklist, cause, fix with solution classes, verification steps, fallback, prevent

tools.name: list_frictions
tools.description: Browse the register: compact list of all published friction records, sorted by last-verified date (newest first). Filter by status and/or category.

tools.name: get_current_drift
tools.description: What is currently broken or regressed in Microsoft Copilot Studio, per the continuously verified Friction Index: all records with status open or regressed (newest status change first) plus register health counts (total records, share verified within 90 days, status distribution).

tools.name: list_patterns
tools.description: All reusable build patterns that prevent whole classes of Copilot Studio friction before they happen (e.g. async continuation for the 100-second flow limit), each with its problem class and related records.

tools.name: get_pattern
tools.description: The complete prevention pattern for a slug: the pattern, when to use it, and step-by-step instructions as markdown, plus the friction records it protects against.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "friction-mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: search_frictions, get_friction_record · Private data: search_frictions, lookup_error, get_friction_record, list_frictions, get_current_drift, list_patterns, get_pattern · Public sink: get_current_drift.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: search_frictions, get_friction_record · Private data: search_frictions, lookup_error, get_friction_record, list_frictions, get_current_drift, list_patterns, get_pattern · Public sink: get_current_drift

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
